programme.title: A Life On The Farm
programme.desc: A family discovers a home-movie left by their late father, detailing the achievements and pitfalls of a humble famer. 2022. United Kingdom. Director: Oscar Harding.

programme.title: Mr Loverman
programme.desc: 1/2. Barry decides to come clean to Morris about his inability to tell Carmen about his intentions for divorce. 2024. UK. Director: Hong Khaou. Starring: Lennie James, Keenan Munn-Francis.

programme.title: Mr Loverman
programme.desc: 1/3. Morris plans to propose after Barry accidentally lead him to believe he wanted marriage. 2024. UK. Director: Hong Khaou. Starring: Lennie James, Tamara Lawrance.

programme.title: Last Summer
programme.desc: Anne puts her work and family life at risk as she forms a passionate relationship with an unlikely suiter. 2023. France. Director: Catherine Breillat. Starring: Léa Drucker, Léa Drucker.

programme.title: Miller's Girl
programme.desc: Relationship between teacher and student gets complicated when she is given a creative writing assignment. 2024. USA. Director: Jade Halley Bartlett. Starring: Martin Freeman, Jenna Ortega.

programme.title: Somersault
programme.desc: Forced to flee her hometown, Heidy lands in the Australian alps. What will her new experiences teach her? 2004. Australia. Director: Cate Shortland. Starring: Abbie Cornish, Sam Worthington.

programme.desc: Amina discovers that her 14-year-old daughter Maria is pregnant. 2021. Chad, France. Director: Mahamat-Saleh Haroun. Starring: Achouackh Abakar Souleymane, Rihane Khalil Alio.

programme.desc: 1/1. After a friend's funeral a pact between mates is made to offer a more dignified death. 2024. UK. Directors: Carl Tibbetts, Chloe Wicks. Starring: Lindsay Duncan, Clarke Peters, Fiona Button.

programme.desc: 1/2. Tom's body washes to shore with his boat, police suspect foul play. 2024. UK. Directors: Carl Tibbetts, Chloe Wicks. Starring: Lindsay Duncan, Clarke Peters, Fiona Button.
